answer:
**Charles Comte, in Chapter 10 of *Traité de Législation, Volume II* ("Of the intellectual development acquired in the islands of the great Ocean..."), examines the Pacific islands ("îles du grand Océan," i.e., the Pacific Ocean) to argue that intellectual progress among their inhabitants—primarily of Malay or Negro/Ethiopian species—is greatest near the equator and declines toward the poles.**[^1]

He specifically discusses the following islands or archipelagos, often comparing their agriculture, dwellings, pirogues (canoes), tools, and social organization based on European explorers' accounts (e.g., La Pérouse, Cook, Dentrecasteaux, Péron):

- **Marquesas Islands** (tropical, Malay species; noted for beauty, agriculture, property division, and advanced utensils).[^2]
- **Navigators’ Islands** (Samoa; tropical; praised for clean villages, elegant houses under fruit trees, fine mats).[^3]
- **Society Islands** (Tahiti etc.; tropical; advanced agriculture, large pirogues, navigation by stars, decimal counting).[^4]
- **Friendly Islands** (Tonga; tropical; divided lands with hedges, roads shaded by trees).[^5]
- **Sandwich Islands** (Hawaii; near-equatorial; agriculture adapted to less fertile soil, curiosity toward Europeans).[^6]
- **Easter Island** (subtropical; basic agriculture with stakes, no enclosures, poor pirogues).[^7]
- **New Zealand** (temperate; fortifications, but filthy huts, crude diet, lack of curiosity).[^8]
- **Van Diemen's Land** (Tasmania; cold, Negro variety; no agriculture, shellfish diet, bark shelters, no government).[^9]
- **New Holland** (Australia; subtropical; some fishing/hunting tools, chiefs, dogs).[^10]
- **New Caledonia** (tropical; advanced agriculture with walls and irrigation).[^11]
- **Tanna** (Vanuatu; agriculture and fishing, walled plantations).[^12]
- **New Hebrides** (Vanuatu; fast canoes).[^13]
- **New Guinea** (equatorial; trade with Chinese, pottery).[^14]

He briefly alludes to but declines to detail the **Sunda Islands, Philippines, and Moluccas** due to mixed populations.[^15]

[^1]: Charles Comte, *Traité de Législation: VOL II*, [chapter](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-ii-20331d/10-du-developpement-intellectuel-acquis-dans-les-iles/translation/).

[^2]: Ibid., [p-7bc4d8](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-ii-20331d/10-du-developpement-intellectuel-acquis-dans-les-iles/translation/#p-7bc4d8).

[^3]: Ibid., [p-dd9c59](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-ii-20331d/10-du-developpement-intellectuel-acquis-dans-les-iles/translation/#p-dd9c59).

[^4]: Ibid., [p-5cad8f](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-ii-20331d/10-du-developpement-intellectuel-acquis-dans-les-iles/translation/#p-5cad8f).

[^5]: Ibid., [p-d31774](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-ii-20331d/10-du-developpement-intellectuel-acquis-dans-les-iles/translation/#p-d31774).

[^6]: Ibid.

[^7]: Ibid., [p-e3f8c0](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-ii-20331d/10-du-developpement-intellectuel-acquis-dans-les-iles/translation/#p-e3f8c0).

[^8]: Ibid., [p-a1b11f](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-ii-20331d/10-du-developpement-intellectuel-acquis-dans-les-iles/translation/#p-a1b11f).

[^9]: Ibid., [p-c9c904](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-ii-20331d/10-du-developpement-intellectuel-acquis-dans-les-iles/translation/#p-c9c904).

[^10]: Ibid., [p-5778c4](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-ii-20331d/10-du-developpement-intellectuel-acquis-dans-les-iles/translation/#p-5778c4).

[^11]: Ibid., [p-6cb12b](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-ii-20331d/10-du-developpement-intellectuel-acquis-dans-les-iles/translation/#p-6cb12b).

[^12]: Ibid., [p-203655](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-ii-20331d/10-du-developpement-intellectuel-acquis-dans-les-iles/translation/#p-203655).

[^13]: Ibid., [p-bcfe9d](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-ii-20331d/10-du-developpement-intellectuel-acquis-dans-les-iles/translation/#p-bcfe9d) (from chapter body).

[^14]: Ibid., [p-fbe0c3](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-ii-20331d/10-du-developpement-intellectuel-acquis-dans-les-iles/translation/#p-fbe0c3).

[^15]: Ibid., [p-7b89c4](/works/charles-comte-traite-de-legislation-vol-ii-20331d/10-du-developpement-intellectuel-acquis-dans-les-iles/translation/#p-7b89c4).
